name: Oat and Brown Sugar Crumb Topping
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Unbleached or whole wheat flour
1/2 cup (1 stick) Cold, unsalted butter, cut into 1/4 in. pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour, oats, brown sugar, cinnamon, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Add the cold butter and rub it into the dry ingredients until you have a uniform, dampish crumb mixture.
3. If the mixture seems overly clumpy, add a tablespoon or two of additional flour.
4. Store any unused topping in a sealed plastic bag in the freezer.
Makes about 2 1/2 cups.
